mapper.insert: INSERT INTO focus_event (user_id, system_code, event_type, event_count, ratio, event_link) VALUES (#{userId}, #{systemCode}, #{eventType}, #{eventCount}, #{ratio}, #{eventLink})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM focus_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE event_type WHEN 'pending_upgrade' THEN 1 WHEN 'completed' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_started' THEN 3 WHEN 'to_be_determined' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT * FROM focus_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND system_code = #{systemCode} ORDER BY CASE event_type WHEN 'pending_upgrade' THEN 1 WHEN 'completed' THEN 2 WHEN 'not_started' THEN 3 WHEN 'to_be_determined' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
